title: Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: $12 million in funding released to support Hydrogen Center of Excellence

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site in Glasgow | Aviation International News Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: ZeroAvia plans to produce hydrogen propulsion systems for aircraft near Glasgow Airport in Scotland. Molicel Batteries Will Power Vaeridion's Electric Microliner
